= AsciiDoc Cross-Document Links

This fixture exercises the cross-document link path for AsciiDoc — the
rendered `<a href>` MUST keep the original `.adoc` extension so the in-app
static-file fallback can resolve the link against the watched root.

By default Asciidoctor rewrites `xref:other.adoc[]` to `href="other.html"`;
uatu sets `relfilesuffix=.adoc` to suppress that rewrite.

== Sibling document

The xref macro: xref:asciidoc-cheatsheet.adoc[the cheat sheet].

The shorthand: see <<asciidoc-cheatsheet.adoc#,the cheat sheet (shorthand)>>.

The plain link macro: link:asciidoc-cheatsheet.adoc[the cheat sheet (link)].

== Nested document

A subdirectory target via xref: xref:guides/notes.adoc[guides/notes].

== External

External links are unaffected: link:https://example.com[example.com].
